_description: Framework adapter inventory. Each binding must implement the adapters listed for its language. If a new adapter is added, update this file and add a corresponding test in the affected binding.
_scope_note: This fixture lists all discovered public functions, which may exceed what the PRD (Task 011) originally specified. This is intentional -- the fixture reflects the actual code, not the minimum PRD spec.

go._note: Go has no framework adapters currently. MCP is consumed via the CLI binary.
